history.content:
<thought>
I see a corridor formed by walls (#) on my left, with some lava (L) cells ahead far on the right side. Directly forward from my current position appears to be empty floor (.). It seems safe to move forward since there is no immediate lava or wall blocking my way. I will move forward to advance while avoiding the lava on the right side.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
